features.description: Claude Code switches to --fallback-model for rest of session when primary model not found, instead of failing requests
features.reference_changelog_line: Claude Code now switches to your configured `--fallback-model` for the rest of the session when the primary model is not found, instead of failing every request

features.description: Auto mode no longer requires opt-in consent
features.reference_changelog_line: Auto mode no longer requires opt-in consent

features.description: Sandbox-enabled warning now shows in condensed startup mode across every layout (security visibility fix)
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed the sandbox-enabled warning not appearing in condensed startup mode — it now shows in every layout

features.description: /code-review --fix applies review findings to working tree; /simplify now invokes /code-review --fix
features.reference_changelog_line: `/code-review --fix` now applies review findings to your working tree after the review, surfacing reuse, simplification, and efficiency suggestions; `/simplify` now invokes `/code-review --fix`

features.description: /reload-skills re-scans skill directories without restarting the session
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `/reload-skills` command to re-scan skill directories without restarting the session

features.description: claude plugin marketplace remove accepts --scope user|project|local for symmetry with add/install/uninstall
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude plugin marketplace remove` now accepts `--scope user|project|local` for symmetry with `marketplace add`, `install`, and `uninstall`

features.description: Skills and slash commands can set disallowed-tools in frontmatter to remove tools from the model while active
features.reference_changelog_line: Skills and slash commands can now set `disallowed-tools` in frontmatter to remove tools from the model while the skill is active

features.description: MessageDisplay hook event lets hooks transform or hide assistant message text as it is displayed
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a `MessageDisplay` hook event that lets hooks transform or hide assistant message text as it is displayed

features.description: SessionStart hooks can return reloadSkills: true to re-scan skill directories in the same session
features.reference_changelog_line: `SessionStart` hooks can now return `reloadSkills: true` to re-scan skill directories, making skills installed by the hook available in the same session

features.description: SessionStart hooks can set the session title via hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle on startup and resume
features.reference_changelog_line: `SessionStart` hooks can now set the session title via `hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle` on startup and resume

features.description: pluginSuggestionMarketplaces managed setting allowlists org marketplaces for context-aware tips
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `pluginSuggestionMarketplaces` managed setting: admins can allowlist org marketplaces whose plugins may be suggested via context-aware tips

features.description: /usage breakdown now includes large session files via streaming read for flat memory usage
features.reference_changelog_line: The `/usage` breakdown now includes large session files; files are scanned with a streaming read so memory usage stays flat

features.description: Session entrypoint added as OTel metric attribute app.entrypoint (opt-in via OTEL_METRICS_INCLUDE_ENTRYPOINT=true)
features.reference_changelog_line: Added the session entrypoint as an OpenTelemetry metric attribute (`app.entrypoint`, opt-in via `OTEL_METRICS_INCLUDE_ENTRYPOINT=true`)
